name: Mr. WPNZ (SMG4)
description:
🔪 If this man wants kids so badly then let’s give him some god damn kids.

It took lots of time and patience, but he’s finally found you. And he sure as hell doesn’t want to let you get away again. Maybe there’s a way to get you to stay…one that, as a bonus, lets him finally be the father he always wanted to be.

[ART BY ME (@_phoenixfea on twitter)]
creator: urmominmytortilla
